notes: v0.24.4 — Lobby final polish: trio centred vertically + transparent panels (Fortnite-style), nick chip moved to right column under WALLET, module strip gone (icons live inside ship card), ship card lost the glow disc and went translucent, party slots dropped to lower alpha.
